hero.subtitle: Evolution API integration for sending text via authenticated REST.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: The whatsapp module sends text messages through the Evolution API (/message/sendText/{instance}). It is a thin wrapper: one REST endpoint and a service using fetch.

notes.title: Instance
notes.description: The instance must exist in Evolution API. The key is sent as the apiKey request header. Missing URL/instance yields HTTP 503.

behavior.title: Error behavior
behavior.description: Network or non-OK Evolution HTTP → BadGatewayException (502). Missing config → ServiceUnavailableException (503). The controller does not return 200 in those cases.

rest.title: REST API
rest.intro: JWT required. No @Roles — any authenticated user.

send.title: Send message
send.description: to: digits only, in the format Evolution expects (include DDI yourself if needed, e.g. 5511999999999). message: text.

errors.title: Error responses
items: 502 — Evolution unreachable or returned an error

number.title: Number format
number.description: The service does not add a DDI. Send to already in the format Evolution API expects (e.g. 5511999999999 for Brazil).

errors.title: API errors
errors.description: Network/HTTP failures from Evolution surface as 502. Success only after response.ok.
